title: Dialog
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Dialog wrapper composed from the local Base UI Dialog primitive, shadcn slot classes, local class canonicalization, static close icon markup, and deterministic local examples.

examples.title: DialogDemo
examples.description: Profile editing dialog with local static field markup.

examples.title: DialogCloseButton
examples.description: Share link dialog with static input and footer close button.

examples.title: DialogNoCloseButton
examples.description: Dialog content without the top-right close button.

examples.title: DialogStickyFooter
examples.description: Dialog with scrollable content and footer action.

examples.title: DialogRtl
examples.description: RTL profile dialog with local static translations.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Dialog attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static Button, Field, Label, Input, and RTL shells instead of unavailable origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: Those components are outside this component slice. Static local markup preserves the relevant Dialog DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts.

deviations.summary: The close icon is local static markup instead of a lucide-react runtime import.
deviations.rationale: lucide-react is not an installable runtime dependency for this registry item.
